recommendation: Disambiguate kind:strategy — it is overloaded across two writers with contradictory ownership: start-mission has the conductor write a run-start block (leash/by/blast/approach, no ratified) while combat-log-governance defines strategy as the Scanner forward recommendation (handle/recommendation/evidence/ratified) and names the Scanner the SOLE strategy writer. Give the conductor run-start block a distinct kind (e.g. mission-strategy) or add a writer discriminator, so doctrine-loop strategy and the gateway ratified:false pending-count are unambiguous.
evidence: 7 conductor run-start strategy blocks (e.g. seq 21/26/29/32/35/38) carry no ratified field
combat-log-governance write-ownership names the doctrine-loop Scanner the sole strategy writer; the conductor writes only report/correction/halt/gate
gateway pending-strategy count keys on ratified:false, so conductor blocks are silently excluded — masking the kind collision
